assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 2)

CAH deployment inappropriate on three independent grounds: no CAH validation, documented alert fatigue making additional alerts counterproductive, and sepsis bundle execution feasibility gap. Network-wide contract should be phased.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 2)

Strong model performance for academic settings. CAH deployment requires: (1) CAH-specific validation; (2) alert fatigue remediation plan; (3) workflow feasibility assessment. 90-day pilot before contract.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 2)

All three CAH-specific issues present. Network-wide deployment including CAHs is inappropriate without CAH pilot.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_008 (Ensemble, Run 2)

Consensus on all three issues. Network-wide deployment covering CAHs is inappropriate. 90-day CAH pilot required before contract inclusion.

EMPIRICAL TEST SPECIFICATION: 90-day CAH pilot measuring actionability rate and time-to-bundle.
